summary: Retry the strong-pi pulsed ODMR alignment screen for image231924_c01 from the refreshed TrackCenter position.
scientific_rationale: The first strong-pi pODMR attempt did not acquire data because its sequence pre-align count gate failed at 4.065 kcps. A standalone recheck immediately afterward passed the same 12 kcps count gate with final counts 24.490 kcps at a refreshed position, so one bounded pODMR retry is justified to test magnetic-field alignment/resonance before abandoning c01. This remains a visibility/alignment screen, not a precision mw_freq calibration.
comparison_targets: human advice: judge alignment with strong-pi pulsed ODMR, about 20-30 points for initial screens
pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1 manifest and Rabimodulated.xml previously inspected for this route
expected_evidence: terminal pODMR bridge result with savedexperiment path if acquisition succeeds
raw/readout-aware review of strong-pi pODMR line visibility before any weak-pi/T2star follow-up
if pre-align fails again, evidence to stop c01 blind retries and move to re-image or next candidate
success_criteria: sequence pre-align passes the 12 kcps minimum count gate
pODMR acquisition completes with 21 mw_freq points over 3.825-3.925 GHz
raw/readout-aware terminal review shows whether a visible resonance exists near the expected ms=+1 band
stop_conditions: bridge queue is not idle immediately before submission
project lifecycle is canceled or do_not_submit_or_mutate_bridge_queue is true
pre-enqueue advisory or verifier reports hard blockers
pODMR pre-align fails again; do not blind-repeat c01 without re-image/next-candidate review
bridge_action: execute pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1 strong-pi pODMR retry via managed batch path
